author: Santi López Puiggené
source_document: Computational parameter specification — v1.2.4. Parameter values define the abstract simulation space. They are not derived from or validated against HFSS, CST, or any other professional electromagnetic simulation tool.

I_simulation_fixed_parameters.note: Active inputs only. 1 unit in simulation space corresponds to 1 meter in the abstract spatial domain. No physical hardware exists or is implied.

III_derived_electrical_values.inductance_derivation_note: L_H = scaling_constant_k * 1e-2. With k=100 this gives L=1.0 H. Combined with C=1.5e-4 F yields omega_0=81.65 rad/s, f_res=12.99 Hz, matching the target 12.5 Hz range.

IV_network_performance_metrics.individual_q_factor_note: Q < 1 places the model in the overdamped regime. Coherence and merit metrics remain valid as comparative structural indicators across morphologies.
IV_network_performance_metrics.systemic_gain: Collective Phased Array gain — computational analogy, not a physical measurement.
IV_network_performance_metrics.synchronization_effect: Power-summation over high-damping abstract network medium

VI_experimental_sweep_parameters.noise_level_note: Symmetric Gaussian perturbation (sigma) applied identically to every morphology at every sweep step. Single source of truth — read by node_coupling.py and parametric_sweep.py.
VI_experimental_sweep_parameters.connection_radius_note: Union-find adjacency radius for topology validation. Matches the spatial extent of all morphologies (~[-1.5, 1.5] to ~[-2.0, 2.0] units).
VI_experimental_sweep_parameters.multi_seed_list_note: 30 consecutive seeds for multi-seed inference analysis. Per-morphology means computed per seed; Welch t-test + Holm-Bonferroni + bootstrap CI applied to the N=30 i.i.d. per-seed means in inference_analysis.py.

VII_array_factor_parameters.k0_base_note: Heuristic spatial scaling coefficient. Not the electromagnetic wave number k0 = 2*pi*f/c. At 12.99 Hz the physical value would be ~2.72e-7 rad/m. This parameter operates in abstract simulation space.

IX_conceptual_reference_values.note: Theoretical/ontological reference values retained for context only. These are NOT read by any module in the pipeline and do not participate in any calculation. Separated from the active parameter sections so they are not mistaken for simulation inputs.
